methodsAttempted.query: site:zju.edu.cn generative AI policy OR artificial intelligence policy
methodsAttempted.notes: Found journal AI policy and course syllabi

methodsAttempted.query: site:zju.edu.cn academic integrity AI policy students
site:zju.edu.cn library AI guidance OR IT security privacy AI
methodsAttempted.notes: No centralized library or IT AI policy found

summary: Discovered one official Zhejiang University journal policy source with explicit generative AI authorship and disclosure requirements. No centralized university-wide AI policy for teaching, learning, assessment, IT/security, or student coursework was found in this run. Course syllabus, webinar, news, and research showcase candidates were rejected as non-AI-specific or not policy guidance.
